candidates.rewrittenSql: SELECT id, order_id, carrier, tracking_no, status, shipped_at FROM shipments ORDER BY shipped_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT id, order_id, carrier, tracking_no, status, shipped_at FROM shipments WHERE shipped_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY shipped_at DESC LIMIT 50
candidates.note: Adds time filter for recent shipments based on common pattern for 'listRecentShipments' function name

candidates.rewrittenSql: SELECT id, order_id, carrier, tracking_no, status, shipped_at FROM shipments WHERE status IN ('shipped', 'delivered') ORDER BY shipped_at DESC LIMIT 50
candidates.note: Filters by shipment status based on function name 'listRecentShipments'
